current_basis: six mule strings with empty calculated tension
required_measurement: total working load and proof load from supplier or measured unit weights
decision_gate: all mule strings have safety factor and frame load component
notes: Do not double or extrapolate load from gauge ranges.

required_measurement: measured speaking length and pitch stability for each loaded mule string
decision_gate: mule notes replace derived_from_mule rows before paired CAD
notes: Paired strings inherit measurements only after the mule is stable.

current_basis: paired row spacing is an open decision
required_measurement: bench mockup with tuning tool access and near far hand clearance
decision_gate: KGH-PAIR-01 CAD records row offset and access check
notes: Ergonomics cannot be inferred from concept images.

scaling_question: neck rail and pin rail section
current_basis: load cases are placeholders without working load
required_measurement: pin coupon torque and loaded neck lean after 24 hours
decision_gate: section is revised in CAD before paired cut list
notes: Frame section must be sized from measured load and deflection.

current_basis: bridge lift and crown gates are defined but unmeasured
required_measurement: bridge lift crown delta crack inspection and brace state at 100 percent and 125 percent load
decision_gate: paired soundboard plan stays blocked until all bridge gates pass
notes: Do not promote soundboard thickness or brace layout from the scaffold.

required_measurement: played paired mockup notes plus revised CAD and measured string schedule
decision_gate: L3 language allowed only after reviewed CAD and physical validation
notes: Family scaling is a later review artifact not a current fabrication claim.

current_basis: CAD DXF and this scaling table are reference only
required_measurement: reviewed CAD DXF or design table named as fabrication authority before cutting
decision_gate: visual register has fabrication authority row before any build visual is required
notes: Generated images and visual BOM plates remain concept_only.
